steps.title: Use the percent per serving
steps.content: One serving provides $5\%$ of the daily potassium allowance.

steps.title: Scale by the number of servings
steps.content: If Jennifer eats $x$ servings, the percent of the daily allowance is $5$ times $x$, so $p=5x$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equation $p=5x$ matches B. The percent is written as $5$, not $0.05$, because $p$ is measured in percent.
